serverInfo.name: scope-guard-mcp
serverInfo.description: Enforces multi-agent scope boundaries — prevents scope drift, work duplication, and infinite delegation loops in agentic systems
serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: create_scope_contract
tools.description: Define agent boundaries: allowed/forbidden tools, file access patterns, delegation limits

tools.name: validate_action
tools.description: Pre-flight check — is this tool call or file access within the agent's scope contract?

tools.name: detect_delegation_loop
tools.description: Analyze a delegation chain for circular patterns that cause infinite loops

tools.name: log_agent_action
tools.description: Track agent actions (tool calls, delegations, file access, completions) for compliance

tools.name: get_compliance_report
tools.description: Per-agent summary: total actions, violations, delegation count, scope utilization %

tools.name: detect_work_duplication
tools.description: Find agents doing the same work by comparing action logs across all agents

resources.description: List all active scope contracts with summary stats

pricing.pro: $99/month — persistent storage, policy templates, Slack/Discord alerts
pricing.enterprise: $499/month — SSO, audit logs, custom policy engine, multi-tenant
